summary: postinstall.js triggers static pattern for child_process + HTTP
details: The package ships a postinstall.js that imports child_process and references HTTP GET and hostname operations. Without traced-code corroboration of how these primitives are composed (e.g., whether GET fetches attacker-controlled content that is then executed, or whether hostname is exfiltrated to a remote endpoint), the pattern is consistent with both benign install diagnostics and an exfil/dropper shape. Manual review of postinstall.js is needed to confirm intent before publishing a verdict.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
